LanguageData.UB_SNS_LeadPoisoned.title: Lead poisoned child
LanguageData.UB_SNS_LeadPoisoned.description: The water of [PAWN_nameDef]'s home was rich with lead from the local unchecked mining operation. The mining company kept the lead pollution a secret from the public, leading to thousands of people in [PAWN_nameDef]'s hometown being diagnosed with major lead poisoning, including themselves.
